_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Manufacturers or other entities responsible for the determination of the CO₂ emissions of a heavy-duty vehicle shall report data for new heavy-duty vehicles in accordance with Part B of Annex IV, by 30 September of each year, for each new heavy-duty vehicle with a date of determination falling within the reporting period ending on 30 June. This paragraph shall not apply to heavy-duty vehicles exempted pursuant to Article 6b.
prior.source_span: By 30 September of each year, they shall report those data to the Commission for each new heavy-duty vehicle with a date of determination, or of assessment, falling within the reporting period ending on 30 June in accordance with the reporting procedure set out in Annex V. This paragraph shall not apply to heavy-duty vehicles that are exempted pursuant to Article 6b.
